entry.title: Re: A Complete Guide to Comparing Versions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello - this is now possible since I wrote my message - measure based calculations now allow you to reference an input control, which has improved things greatly.

Thanks
David

entry.title: How to transform table extracts from S/4HANA to a usable event log doc for Signavio purposes pls?
entry.content:
I am trying to analyse the P2P process and have extracted the relevant tables from S/4HANA system as csv files. Now I need to manually upload those tables into Signavio, but I understand those need to be in an event log format. Any guidance on how I can achieve this data transformation please?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: [50017] Invalid Data Binding Error while Plotting chart with two Measures in Fiori OVP
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue. Have you found any resolution or workaround? Would really appreciate any insights!

entry.title: Re: Visibility of Categories, product by userGroup
entry.content:
hi @mansurarisoy, I will study the solr part, thanks a lot. About the visibility of products depending on categories, I'm not agree with you for a simple reason: when you set (using your example) the visibility on C2, the visibility is applied recursively on children categories (after you add the user group in 'visibility to' on c2, the same usergroup is added on C3 and C4, you just need to synchronize, this stuff works).

Also, I forgot to write on my post that my restriction (Frontend_RestrictedProduct) works in the opposite way (it redirect to 404 when a mediaCustomerGroup user try to open product page of a product, product child of monitor_&_TV category). So, basically, my idea is correct, probably I'm lost on the 'where' (or on the relations) of the query.

For be more clear (and using your example):

C1 > C2 > C3 > C4 > P1

U1, U2, aU (aU = anonymous user)

U1 element of UG1

C2 visible to UG1

C1 (no limitation on 'visibility to'): visible to all

C2 (manually added UG1 to 'visibility to'): visible only to Ui where Ui are element of UG1 (category page is hide, it works)

C3 and C4 (they inherit the UG1): visible only to Ui where Ui are element of UG1 (category pages for C3 and C4 are hide, it works)

P1 (my expectation: Product page for P1 must be hide for U2 and aU, visible for U1; how it works OOTB: P1 is visible to all; OOTB + my_restriction: P1 is hide for U1 and visible to U2 and aU)

entry.title: Field addition in 'Manage Documented Credit Decision' app with custom logic
entry.content:
Want to add some field with custom logic in app 'Manage Documented Credit Decision' .

Is there any way to add logic for the app in CFL? or is there any other way to extend the underlying RAP views ?

entry.title: Re: Request for Quotation & Contracts in Fieldglass system
entry.content: @Brent_FG thank you so much for your reply and providing links. really helps!

entry.title: Migrating from SAP BTP CF subaccount to other CF subaccount
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to migrate our existing SAP BTP CF subaccount to other new CF subaccount. Please guide us, what are the steps / standard processes need to be followed during this process.

Note - Both the CF subaccounts (new & old) are under the same Global account.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:
Have a problem closing a production order which changes status from release to close. That show error message : 

The instance of the SQL Server Database Engine cannot obtain a LOCK resource at this time. Rerun your statement when there are fewer active users. Ask the database administrator to check the lock and memory configuration for this instance, or to check for long-running transactions.

But some production order which changes status from plan to release to close is not problem.

Firstly : Checking database :  sessionid or processid is not LOCK.

Pls. help to solve this problem.  SAP 9.3 PL11, MSSQL 2014

entry.title: Data Replication from S4 Hana Public Cloud to FG
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

For data replication for organizational structure and master data from S4 Hana Cloud to FG, is "SAP S/4HANA Master Data Replication (Inbound)" also applicable for S/4 Hana Public Cloud? In this link↓↓↓ it mentions from S/4 HANA and on premise but i am unsure if this includes S4 Hana Public Cloud solution.

SAP S/4HANA Master Data Replication (Inbound) | SAP Help Portal
"Describes how to use SAP Fieldglass Configuration Manager to enable and configure connectors for replicating master data from SAP S/4HANA and on premise using SAP Master Data Integration service."

Thank you.
Evol

entry.title: Re: Visibility of Categories, product by userGroup
entry.content: Yes, you’re absolutely right. It’s handled in the CategoryPrepareInterceptor; I missed that implementation. In this case, we should consider the note in the documentation: "Frontend restriction on category is deactivated by default for performance purposes." Even the current version of the restriction might cause performance degradation, so adding additional JOINs to the query could make things worse. I suggest thoroughly testing your changes to the restriction with regard to performance.

entry.title: EBS Search Strings case sensitive
entry.content:
Hi all

I want to know wetter it is possible in the bank statement to change the note of payee always to uppercases during import via FF_5.

We are changing from format MT940 to CAMT.53. The MT940 format changes the note of payee standard to uppercase (coding in SAP itself). For CAMT this is not the case. The reason behind the question is the search strings which are case sensitive. It is a lot of work and almost impossible to create all the different variations of search terms. Changing the text to uppercase only makes is a lot easier.

 

Best regards

Niels

entry.title: Re: S4 Public Edition - Incorrect Public Sector Activatio...
entry.content:
Hi @Sridhar_Venkatsubban 

as mentioned in the help page Define Scope the initial selection for the Sector/Bundle/County/Scenario is final and can no longer be reverted.

The workspace can be scrapped and deleted in case deployment  and activation did not occurred.

If this is already passed the only option you have is to open a reprovisioning request and ask the S/4 Hana Public Cloud operations support team to provide you new deployment targets to use for the setup of the starter landscape starting the setup from scratch and selecting the desired sector as Private in the new evaluation Workspaces created in the same Central Business Configuration system.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Re: Forecast schedule lines vs. Planned schedule lines in...
entry.content:
Hello @AndreasMuno ,

Thank you for your answer.

I am aware of these documentations, which have helped me start the setup.

In the Test Script, at step 5.5.6 "Generate Planning Delivery Schedule (Optional)", the document explains that "For delivery schedule generated via EDI, planning delivery schedule will generate automatically."

However, even though they will receive the forecast delivery schedules via EDI from their buyers, our customer wishes to control them first before generating the planning delivery schedules manually. The reason being that they want to prevent changes in the MRP without manually checking the incoming demands first. (planning delivery schedule lines impact MRP, but forecast delivery lines do not).

And to come back to my original question, our customer needs a way to distinguish forecast delivery schedule lines that the buyers consider as "real forecast (type F)" vs. forecast delivery schedule lines that buyers consider as "real demand (type R)" (there is a field to make this distinction in the incoming messages). Is there anywhere I can store this information on the forecast delivery schedule line level ?

Another idea that came to my mind was to duplicate every sales scheduling agreements : one for type F forecast and one for type R forceast, but it was too complicated and difficult to maintain...

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to know if current system is Productio...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Use class : cl_abap_context_info and method : get_system_url( ) to get the system URL.

 

DATA(lv_system) TYPE string.
DATA(lv_var1) TYPE string.
DATA(lv_var2) TYPE string.
DATA(it_sys) TYPE TABLE OF REF TO cl_com_system.
DATA(lr_sys) TYPE REF TO cl_com_system.
DATA(systemid) TYPE string.

" Get the system URL
lv_system = cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_url( ).

" Split the URL at '.' into lv_var1 and lv_var2
SPLIT lv_system AT '.' INTO lv_var1 lv_var2.

" Read the communication systems
cl_com_system_factory=>create_instance( )->query_cs( IMPORTING et_com_system = it_sys ).

" Loop through the communication systems


LOOP AT it_sys INTO lr_sys.
" System is the own system
IF lr_sys->is_own_system( ) = abap_true.
systemid = to_upper( lr_sys->get_id( ) ).

exit.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

" Alternatively, loop and check the hostname
LOOP AT it_sys INTO lr_sys.
IF lr_sys->get_hostname( ) CS lv_var1.
systemid = to_upper( lr_sys->get_id( ) ).

exit.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

 

Regrads,

Pradeep.

entry.title: Re: Error in deploying MTA project
entry.content: @MioYasutake Thank you for your prompt solution. The error has been resolved.

entry.title: Re: Visibility of Categories, product by userGroup
entry.content:
And for the query I think you should change {c2p:source}={item:pk} part to {c2p:target}={item:pk} since target side of the CategoryProductRelation is Product type. Your final restriction should be 

 

EXISTS ({{select {c2ug:pk} from {CategoryProductRelation as c2p JOIN Category2PrincipalRelation as c2ug on {c2p:source}={c2ug:source}} where {c2p:target}={item:pk} AND {c2ug:target} IN ( ?session.user, ?session.user.allGroups )}})

entry.title: Use of Additional Schemas for Integration in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In our current setup with SAP S/4HANA and SAP CAR databases, we use additional schemas beyond the standard application schema, primarily for integration purposes.

I would like to know:

  1. From a technical perspective, is it feasible to use additional schemas in a private cloud environment (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud under RISE)?
  2. Are there any specific licensing requirements or considerations for using such schemas in this context?

I would greatly appreciate your insights or experiences regarding these points.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Incompleteness check ship-to party (address) in VA01
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm wondering if there is a chance to extend the incompleteness check by the content of the adress of the ship-to party. We have an issue that a sales order was created with an empty ship-to address. Account has been taken from masterdata, but the external system sent the order with an empty address. 

So I like to check, if the address is existing or not.

Is there a way with standard customizing? Have not found the option, yet. 

Thx, chris

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2025 年第一季度新功能介绍（一）
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能（BI）、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

SAP 分析云 2025 年第一季度的新功能将于2月中下旬正式上线，本系列文章将简单为大家介绍本次更新的部分新功能。更多功能细节请关注未来更新的系列文章。完整更新功能列表请查看SAP官方Help文档。

 

故事的计算中支持单位转换功能

之前的版本中，故事中的计算仅支持货币转换，而没有单位转换选项。更新之后，通过引入了单位转换表（类似于货币转换表），用于定义不同单位之间的转换关系，使得 SAC 通用模型支持处理单位和转换。

目前模型支持以下功能：

1、引入单位换算表（类似货币换算表）

 

2、引入“单位”作为属性，可以作为通用度量的一部分进行维护。

 

 

3、创建单位换算度量，将在计算时执行单位转换（类似于货币换算）。

4、相同类型的单位可以相互换算，例如：长度单位（米、千米、英寸、英尺、英里...）、重量单位（克、千克、磅...）

5、聚合限制：不同单位的数字不应该被聚合。例如：无法将英里转换为升。

6、默认情况下，将在模型中启用单位转换。

 

 

在故事中使用单位换算需要满足以下要求：

  • 在故事中为度量模型和通用模型引入单位转换作为新类型的计算所得度量，作为交叉计算。

 

 

 

  • 在选择源度量时注意选择选择单位类型为“单位”的度量，否则会给出相应的错误提示。例如：下面情况中，“curr”度量在模型中的单位类型被定义为“货币”而不是“单位”，此时会给出相应的错误提示。

 

  • 注意目标单位要存在于单位换算表中，如果在单位换算表中如果目标单位不存在，也会给出相应的错误提示信息。

 

 

数据分析器 – 洞察的广播和计划发布

本次更新后，在数据分析器中进行广播或计划发布时，允许以 Excel 、CSV 或 PDF 格式分享洞察。

  • 灵活的发布安排：

您可以直接在数据分析器的“计划发布”功能下设置洞察的自动发布时间。这意味着您可以提前规划发布日程，确保洞察在最佳时机自动发送给相关人员。

  • 支持多渠道发布：

无论是从文件库、收藏夹还是关注的文件中，您都可以选择洞察进行计划发布。

  • 支持多种文件格式：

导出的工作流均支持 Excel 、CSV 和 PDF 三种格式。

  • 支持多种数据源和模型：

几乎支持所有数据源和模型（除了SAP Datasphere，因为其特殊性无法支持发布安排），确保您能够无障碍地使用所有导出工作流程。

只有拥有相应安排发布权限的用户才能使用这项功能，管理员可以在日历区域监控和管理所有的发布计划，确保一切按计划进行。

 

 

视频数据故事

 

本次季度更新引入了视频数据故事功能，它让用户能够轻松将业务洞察转化为个性化短视频，并实现即时分享。这一新的形式利用了短视频的便捷性，将传统故事转化为包含动画和音乐的吸引人内容，而故事设计者不需要掌握视频编辑的技能。视频数据故事作为文件资源库的一部分，便于管理和共享。

2025年QRC1版本集成了多种最常用的统计图类型，包括条形图、饼图、折线图和数值点，并支持文本微件。另外，视频数据故事还支持一系列附加的配置，例如：在相邻统计图之间添加平滑的过渡效果、选择视频的展示方向、背景图像设置、添加背景音乐、以及将视频下载到本地设备。

使用视频数据故事功能的具体方法如下：

首先打开一个优化体验故事，在编辑模式下找到如下设置，启用视频数据故事的选项。

 

 

接着切换到查看模式，点击统计图的菜单，在更多选项中找到视频数据故事的编辑入口。

 

在这里我们可以看到图表已经被添加到了视频数据故事中。点击左下方的按钮，您可以编辑每条视频的标题、说明和视频效果。

 

 

我们也可以点击工具栏上方的设置，添加背景图像、音乐等，其中图像支持自定义上传。编辑完成并保存此视频数据故事后，您可以选择预览并下载到本地。同时，您也可以在SAC文件库中找到该视频，选择与他人共享或在查看模式下打开，以便进一步的业务沟通和数据展示。

 

SAP BW 和 S4/HANA数据模型现支持度量间的阈值比较

本次更新后，在故事中现在针对 SAP BW 和 SAP S4/HANA 模型中的阈值也可以支持通过度量比较的功能。目前在图表、表格和地理可视化对象中均可以使用与阈值比较，您可以选择与一个度量或数字范围进行比较，也可以在同一个度量上定义多个阈值。

 

此外在数据分析器中中也支持 SAP BW 和 SAP S4/HANA 模型的条件格式设置，来通过度量比较阈值。

 

注意事项：

  • 此功能仅限于我们的优化体验，即故事2.0和LWV，确保您在使用最新版本的工具时获得最佳体验。
  • 现在支持 SAP BW 版本7.5及以上，对于旧版本的SAP BW数据模型，将禁用“与比较”选项，并提供工具提示，说明您的模型需要更新到支持IF公式的版本。

 

组合增强：支持链接分析

 

更新后，组合可以作为链接分析中应用于“页面上的所有微件”或“仅选定微件”的目标微件。

 

通过链接分析中筛选器交互设置，可以应用于“页面中的所有微件”或“仅选定微件”，被链接的目标微件将包含组合，使得筛选结果可以仅在组合中生效。

 

 

 

组合增强：支持流式布局面板

现在，故事设计者可以在组合中创建流式布局面板并添加微件，并将其嵌入到其他故事中。在这个容器内，用户可以自定义响应式规则，使得设计能够适应不同屏幕尺寸。流式布局面板的特性在于它提供了比传统响应式页面更大的灵活性，使用户能够根据屏幕大小自由设计屏幕布局。

通过URL参数公开脚本变量

启用“通过URL参数公开变量”的选项后，用户查看故事时此脚本变量会在URL中动态更新。具体来说，这些变量在故事首次加载时被设定，而在故事运行过程中，用户若重新选择了筛选器，则应用无需重启即可实时更新URL参数。这一改进主要使得与他人共享故事的操作更为便捷，同时确保了对方设定了相同的筛选器配置。

例如，用户在打开一个带有URL参数p_Range=100的故事后，可能会因为某些交互操作将参数更改为200。在这种情况下，想要共享一个参数为200的故事，只需要直接在URL中更新对应的参数值即可。

这一动态URL更新的功能，允许SAC在不重新刷新的情况下更新URL参数，带来显著性能提升的同时用户提供更加流畅和便捷的使用体验。

 

 

脚本API：用于自定义故事弹出窗口的大小

本次更新中，我们对弹出窗口功能进行了升级。之前，用户只能在样式设置面板中以像素为单位定义弹出窗口的宽度和高度。现在，为了更好地适应各种屏幕和响应式场景，弹出窗口能够自动适应屏幕大小，并支持动态尺寸调整。

我们引入了一个新的脚本API，允许故事设计者轻松地将弹出窗口的宽度和高度设置为百分比，从而实现根据屏幕分辨率自动调整大小的功能。这样可以确保弹出窗口在不同设备上的显示效果更加一致和协调。

此外，您现在可以在弹出窗口的按钮中嵌入脚本，实现在故事运行时动态调整窗口的宽度和高度，无论是使用像素还是百分比单位，从而满足不同内容展示的需求。

以下是一段示例代码：

Popup.setSize({

    width: 666, widthUnit: PopupSizeUnit.Pixel, // 666px

    height: 77, heightUnit: PopupSizeUnit.Percent // 屏幕大小的66%

});

此外，故事设计者还可以监听弹出窗口的“onResize”事件，以更新弹出窗口内部的其他微件的大小和位置。

 

运行时更改图表使用的模型

编辑SAC故事时，我们有时会使用多个相似的图表来展示不同模型的数据。为了简化这一过程，我们推出了一个新的功能：允许用户在故事运行时更改图表所关联的模型。通过API和模型选择对话框，用户能够直接在后台切换模型数据，并动态更新数据绑定，实现图表的实时更新。这样，即使需要展示多个模型的数据，也只需维护一个图表实例，降低了故事复杂性的同时也提高了性能。

具体的实现方法有两种。您可以通过脚本API将模型切换功能集成到按钮中，实现一键切换模型的效果。只要在按钮中添加Chart.setModel(modelId)即可。以下是一段示例代码，这段代码可用于设置模型和对应的维、度量。

 

第二种方法则更为简洁，只需给按钮添加脚本：Chart_openSelectModelDialog()，即可打开“选择模型”对话框。用户可以手动选择想要展示的模型。

 

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的中文 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP 分析云即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Activating trial Instance Of integration suite hangs on activating Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,
I tried to activate a new trial instance of IS on AWS US. However it hangs on activating the Cloud Integration capability. First it failed and after retrying it nou hangs for long time on 51 %.

Can anybody help me out?

Update: The activation failed with the message:
Error T001: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed. Please try again later. If the issue persists, learn to solve from integration experts by creating a post in the community fo

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA integration with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content: Hi Rajesh, The steps for adding/enabling client username is explained in detail here. For connection issue, please create an incident/ticket on AEM component for verifying the configurations.

entry.title: SAP Companion: Link Tiles not language sensitive?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I always thought that Link Tiles in Companion respond to the UI-language of the application. In this case S/4HANA. But that doesn´t seem to work. What I have created is: 

  • Link Tile A with a link to a Simulation A (in language EN)
  • Link Tile B with a link to a Simulation B (in language DE)

I would have expected that when a user logs on in S/4HANA in EN, he only sees Link Tile A, because the underlying SEN-object is in EN. And when a user logs on in DE, he only sees Link Tile B. However, that´s not the case. Regardless of the logon language, both Link Tiles are visible. I have looked if I can set a condition based on language, but that condition is not available.

How to deal with this? 

Regards,
Carlo

entry.title: Re: Help! Why Don’t I Get a Notification for My Custom Situation?
entry.content:
Hi @angelika_salmen, 

Thank you for this blog post. It is really helpful. Would you be able to post a blog with step by step process for how to setup situation handling - extended functionality in details for one of the procurement scenario?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: What does diffusion mean in sap ？
entry.content: What is the sales diffusion of material master data in the MM module in SAP ？Maybe my description is a bit confusing, thank you for your patience.

entry.title: Unlock the Full Potential of SAP Signavio: Your Guide to Seamless Ecosystem Integration
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

We are thrilled to announce the release of a new comprehensive guide focused on integrating with the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite through APIs and other integration capabilities.  

Access the document  here 

This document is your go-to guide for navigating the vast possibilities of the SAP Signavio ecosystem. Whether you're a developer, business analyst, system administrator or decision maker, you'll find valuable insights and practical examples to help you leverage the full suite of SAP Signavio solutions. Here’s what you can expect:  

Comprehensive Tools and Methodologies 
Dive deep into the tools and methodologies that make integration smooth and efficient. Understand how to seamlessly connect and extend your existing systems with SAP Signavio's robust offerings.  

Practical Use Cases 
Explore detailed use cases tailored to each SAP Signavio solution. See real-world applications and get insights on how these solutions can transform your business processes. 

Standard Integrations and Technical Assistance 
Discover the available standard integrations and access technical help to guide you through the process. Our aim is to ensure you have all the support you need to achieve successful custom integrations. 

Community Feedback and Support 
We believe in the power of community. A comprehensive list of resources is included in the guide to help you connect with support teams and fellow users for feedback and assistance in overcoming any integration challenges you might face. 

Whether you are new to SAP Signavio or already a seasoned user, this guide is crafted to help you harness the full power of our solutions. We understand the complexities of integration, and our goal is to provide you with a resource that not only educates but also empowers.  

We look forward to your feedback and engaging with you as you explore and implement the capabilities outlined in this guide. Feel free to leave your thoughts and comments below or reach out to me directly through the community platform.

entry.title: sales process in pharma
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any source of information from SAP for sales process in pharma industry, could be best practices to check or leaning journey?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Error VPK1310 in DP93 - Intercompany Resource Related...
entry.content: Hi Lakshmipathi, thank you for your suggestion. Unfortunately, since we're using S4CORE 108, this note cannot be implemented.

entry.title: Should we take the backup of IBP Test & IBP Production System if we need to update the Time profile
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For an IBP Template Pivot table issue, SAP has suggested to correct the Time profile description and upload the time profile to IBP system.

before doing that, they suggested to take the backup.

Hence, Should we take the backup of IBP Test & IBP Production System if we need to update the Time profile?

Thanks in advance,

saranya

entry.title: SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content:
Hello,

im trying to send Email to specific user when Workflow goes to his Business workplace.

everything goes well except its doesnt send any email can u guy help me finde the error?

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content:
I tried it on my local with SAP Commerce version 2211.31 and cloudhotfolders-2211azuresdk12-20241205.zip file from SAP Note. When I uploaded test.csv following messages are printed in console and the file moved to error folder.
 
INFO  [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [LoggingMonitorRecorder] HOT_FOLDER:test.csv1737538248000 Status [IN_PROGRESS]
Step [DOWNLOADED] Node [0] Status [SUCCESS] Started [2025-01-22T12:30:59.706+03:00] Ended [2025-01-22T12:30:59.746+03:00] Duration [40]ms Message [Successfully read blob [master/hotfolder/test.csv] of size [108 bytes]] Actions [none]
WARN  [AzureIntegrationTaskExecutorThread-master-1] [LoggingMonitorRecorder] HOT_FOLDER:test.csv1737538248000 Status [WARNING]
Step [DOWNLOADED] Node [0] Status [SUCCESS] Started [2025-01-22T12:30:59.706+03:00] Ended [2025-01-22T12:30:59.746+03:00] Duration [40]ms Message [Successfully read blob [master/hotfolder/test.csv] of size [108 bytes]] Actions [none]
Step [FILE_ROUTED] Node [0] Status [FAILURE] Started [null] Ended [null] Duration [null]ms Message [File [test.csv] modified [1737538248000] was not routed as didn't match any configurations] Actions [none]
Which version of SAP Commerce and hotfolder extensions are you using? And could you try to find log messages during startup stating that something is wrong with hotfolder extensions or setup, if any?

entry.content: Welcome aboard and enjoy the ride! 👋

entry.title: Re: Characteristics CDS View ：I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate
entry.content: Hi there

entry.title: Re: Please advise how to write on WBS Budget Availability...
entry.content:
Hi @GiorgioDep,

I talked to my colleagues and actually the Budget Availability Control for projects is only available in Public Cloud and not in Private Cloud, as the customizing is different in both systems.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Characteristics CDS View ：I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate
entry.content: Hi there, we are using S4H Public cloud. I tried to associated all these CDS views from SAP note 3244147 into one Custom CDS view. I_BATCHDISTINCT and I_CLFNOBJECTCHARCVALFORKEYDATE are fine joined. I am also able select the elements from those two views. When it comes to I_CLFNCHARCDESCFORKEYDATE I am able to join between through CharcInternalID of the last two views. But for the latter view I am not able to add its elements: I_CLFNCHARCDESCFORKEYDATE. I am getting an error: "The association "_I_ClfnCharcDescForKeyDate" cannot be used locally in the view (see long text)"

entry.title: Re: Resulttype of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[...
entry.content:
Hi

Thank you .

And for  add the additional field manually is of this way:

TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_displaydata_order,
    INCLUDE TYPE SFIOM_S_REPL_REQ_ORG_ASS_EXTND,
    persg       TYPE persg.
TYPES END OF gty_displaydata_order.
 
DATA :lt_fin  TYPE TABLE OF gty_displaydata_order .
MOVE-CORRESPONDING is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment TO lt_fin.
*...Here read a table db for the the records and get the persg.
LOOP at lt_fin INTO data(ls_fin).
*...Here READ TABLE it_table_persg
wa-persg = it_table_persg[ KEY key POSITION_ID = lt_fin ].
lt_fin-persg = wa-persg.
                  
ENDLOOP.

Regards

entry.title: How to add 'Additional filter option s4 standard event'
entry.content:
Hi,

I could extend the payload of event mesh for business partner as described below video.

" Extending SAP S/4HANA Cloud events with RAP and event filtering plus dynamic topics in S4HC "

but It failed to add the filter option in S4 hana on-premise. 

Position is not available in S4 Hana -on premise .

Can you please help on this?

Thanks,

Rehan

entry.title: New SAP consultants humbly ask
entry.content:
New SAP consultants humbly ask, what is the general daily job of a consultant from Party B?To become a consultant, what level of SAP-related skills do you need to achieve, and which countries or regions currently have good development prospects in the industry?

Under the premise of my interest in this industry and lifelong learning, can this industry continue until retirement?

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model: What’s New as of 2025-01-20
entry.content:
Hello dear readers!  Happy New Year!!!

Last month, my colleague released a What’s New blog post regarding enhancements that were delivered to SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Universal Model (SAP PaPM Cloud UM) application.

This month marks the start of another year, and new year means new enhancements. I am here to introduce the latest enhancements that were delivered to SAP PaPM Cloud UM application.

Read on for this month’s instalment.

Model

Model Screen

The Model Screen is a central component that allows users to create, manage, and visualize various functions. It has undergone several key improvements which significantly enhances its usability and functionality. These upgrades provide users with a more intuitive and efficient workspace for creating, managing, and visualizing models.

When creating a new Function, a pop-up will appear prompting the user to enter the Function Name, Description, and API State. After clicking Create, the Function will be created immediately. The function details will then appear automatically in draft edit mode, allowing further modifications.

Spoiler
Function details will be displayed in both Diagram and Hierarchy for all function after left clicking on them or creation, except Folder.

For Folder, upon creation or left clicking, only the function attributes will be displayed in properties panel as that is what exist in the folder structure. This is also the same behavior if a right click is performed on a folder.

Additionally, a full-screen option is available, allowing users to work in an expanded view for greater ease of navigation and editing. You can expand view in both properties panel and main screen.

A refresh option is also available, allowing users to refresh the screen. This action refreshes the Diagram/List and the Properties Panel display. The refresh functionality is applied to various elements, including Fields, Connections, Partitions, and Event Logs.

 

Manage Writers

Package Size and new type Export in Writer Function 
The Writer function now can be managed by package sizes and has a new Writer type Export.

Let’s dive into the Package Size topic first.

As a user, you know how important it is to send data smoothly, but sometimes, trying to send a huge amount of data at once is like trying to stuff a whole elephant into a tiny suitcase – it just doesn't work!  Things can slow down, cause problems, or even crash the system.

That’s where Package Size comes in. This new feature in the Writer Function is available in all Writer types. It lets you control their data transfers. Sending data in smaller packages keeps things moving efficiently, this means you can now write data to remote targets, like SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), SOAP, and OData in smaller and more manageable chunks. This is especially helpful when you are sending data to remote target preventing the system from being overloaded and improving performance. You can now decide the size of each package by sending a large amount of data without worrying about overloading the system or causing any problems/hiccups.

Now, let me guide you how package size works in the Writer Function.

The feature is in the General Information which allows you to specify the package size, which varies between 1 and 999,999,999. If the package size exceeds the maximum value of 999,999,999 a validation error occurs.

As an example, if the package size is left empty or set to the maximum value of 999,999,999 your data will be sent as a one big chunk. 

Let’s say you are writing 1000 data records. You can set the package size to 100 meaning that the data records will be split into 10 packages containing 100 data records each and the system will processed it at the same time or in parallel.

On a successful run with Package Size, you can see how many data records were inserted after selecting a package size via Manage Event Log that reads: "Processing Package 10 of 10. Records processed in this package: 100".

Now that you have a better understanding of how Package Size works, let me discuss to you about the new Writer Type called “Export”.

In addition, the "Export" type, primarily used with SOAP connections, this is used for tracking which record (document) was reversed by which record. In the input data, there is a reversal field that holds the ID of the record that was reversed. After writing, the output contains a reversed field, which holds the ID of the row where the reversal record is located. 

For accounting use cases, it is essential to ensure that documents and reversals are not separated into different packages. This packaging ensures that a reversal and its corresponding reversed document are in the same package. 

Here is an example of simple visualization on how package sizes can be determined with given reversal/reversed fields (package size is 2 in this example): 

In the Universal Modeling application, when a user selects the "Export" Writer function type, both the Reversal Field and Reversed Field becomes mandatory.

To see how reversed and reversal fields work, you can check this link in our Help Portal:  

For accounting use cases, check out this blog on how to post a document using our Connection and Writer function with related SOAP Services. It provides step-by-step instructions! 

Early Exit Check for Writer Function with OData Connection

In Universal Model, Writer functions can use an OData Service connection to write. It is also possible that models from your existing connection have a mandatory parameter that your writer will require as an input to your result model function from your connection. See sample image below: 

Previously, when you run the Writer function with a mandatory parameter empty, the function would still send the request to the HTTP destination path configured in your connection. However, as expected, it would return an like the one shown in the image below.

With the new enhancement, if the Model Entity, in conjunction with OData, has a mandatory Parameter that is empty, running your Writer function will be aborted and a proper validation error will be returned. For example, see the image below:

This improvement will lessen the runtime of your Writer function. Instead of sending the request to the specified HTTP destination with empty parameters, Universal Model will automatically abort the run and return a clear message.

Process

Manage Activities

Activity Settings facet for Activity Users

In the Manage Activity application, there are 2 types of users that can access the mentioned application, Process Users and Activity Users. A new security enhancement has been implemented for the mentioned users to improve the user experience based on their roles and actions to be performed. 

Previously, the Activity screen visible for both users have the Activity information like Runtime Environment, Process, Activity, Description, Show Rules, Show Data etc., and Activity Settings like Enable Run, Enable Confirm, Enable Reject, Enable Show Data, Enable Rules etc. in General Information section.

With the new enhancement, the General Information fields are now segregated into two sections: General Information and Activity Settings. 

As a Process Users, these users are the one managing the activity (creation, editing and deleting). With that, these users should have the access to manage/configure the General Information and Activity Settings. 

In General Section, it contains the following activity information:

While in Activity Settings, it contains the following:

Note: The Activity Information and Settings still have the same functionality. There are no functionality changes just the displaying of fields. 

For Activity Users, as these users only focuses on the actions to be performed in an activity such as run, confirm, reject, show data etc., they are only required to view the General Information together still with Activity Fields, Activity Parameters and Documentation Section. 

Activity Setting section is not visible to Activity Users as the fields for it are for configuration purposes only. 

For more information you can check the Manage Activities > Simple Function Activity Configuration section in the Application Help for Universal Model

Support for deep nested authorization paths via association-to-one relations

A new feature was implemented for Activity users which is the support for deep nested authorization paths that will restrict any actions (view, create, delete, edit) to Activity users based on their data authorization in Manage Activities using association-to-one data relation. 

Currently, when you are accessing the show data screen of an activity, your data authorization will be restricted based on the teams assigned as Reader and Writer together with its defined activity field, data privilege and data locks.  

Having this new feature, if you have a data with relations (specifically Association-To-One) defined in the Activity Field or Data Privilege or Data Locks field selection, even if only the field value of a related entity has an authorization restriction, data access restriction will be also applied to the data related to the value defined in the selection. 

For a detailed explanation of this new feature a separate blog post will be released soon with examples so that you can visualize its behavior. 

Report

Manage Reports

Reference Creation and Management in Reports 

This feature allows users to link show elements, data elements, and text to specific targets within the same report, creating dynamic and intuitive navigation for dashboard users. 

With this enhancement you can now create, use, and delete references on your reports.

The steps below will help in your configuration so that you can maximize this functionality.

Create References 

In edit mode, users can now assign references to Text, Show Elements, Data Elements and Application Elements.

1. Switch report to edit mode.

2. If you want to add reference to a text element, highlight the text and select Reference in Standard Document Area menu.

3. If you want to add reference to a Show Element, Data Element or Application Element, select the element and then click on the Set Reference Link  icon.

Note: to see the link Icon, you need to hover over the grid.

4. Then select the one target element from the pop-up window – Pages/Tags, Show elements.

5. You can also provide external link for the reference by choosing the “Set External link” switch On.

 6. Save the changes.

Use References in Display Mode

1. In edit format, when the icon is blue, it indicates that the reference is embedded in a specific table.  

2.  In display mode, clicking on a referenced show element, data element, application element or text will take users directly to the assigned target. 

3. Once you saved the report with embedded reference, the edit, columns, and filters features are disabled.

4. To use reference: in display mode, click on the referenced element to navigate to the assigned target.

Delete References

Users can remove references easily if they are no longer needed or if changes to the dashboard’s. Users can delete references in edit mode with ease by choosing the “Clear” button.

Manage Pages

Drag-and-Drop Functionality for Page Filters 

In edit page mode, the drag-and-drop feature was added to allow you to rearrange the order of page filters effortlessly. To use this functionality, you must click on the square dots beside the field you want to move then drag it to the new position where you want it to be, it’s that simple. Whether you’re making quick adjustments or entirely reorganizing your filters, this new capability makes managing your filters intuitive and straightforward. 

If you are interested with what was delivered to the application from the previous months, you may search for the tag “PaPMCloudUMWhatsNew” and you will be directed to our previous What’s New blog posts.

That is all for now and hope to see you on my next blog posts.

entry.title: Opening invoice from 'Manage supplier invoices centrally' sometimes has error 'Forbidden'.
entry.content:
In the app 'Manage supplier invoices Centrally' we sometimes encounter the error message 'Forbiddden' when we click a line to open the invoice details.
Strange thing is that this happens only for some of the invoices while other invoices in the list are opening just fine. 
Another strange behavior is that another user doesn't get the error when opening this same invoice. So sometimes we need another user to 'open' up the invoice and then the originating user can also open it. 

Anyone also has this problem?

regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: I'm using SAP Commerce 2211.32 and IEP 30, i updated the classes following the guide but I remember hotfolders didn't work even with older versions with this installation. I note that i can't find any log regarding AzureIntegrationUnprocessedFileTaskExecutorThread, so there might be an issue with these threads starting?

entry.title: Re: IPS Provisioning to and from non-SAP 3rd part applica...
entry.content:
@VedettevanKleef 

By looking at your screenshot of IPS, you don't have SCIM System in the dropdown .. so you cannot bring the users from 3rd Party system.

By looking at your Screenshot of IAS - Application & Resources - Applications.. you can able to upload SAML or OpenId connect using Non - SAP Solution for Single Sign on.

entry.title: Re: SAP Easy Document Management Windows 11 address bar i...
entry.content:
As already mentioned in a previous answer, SAP Easy DMS is being phased out and will no longer be maintained.

A solution that uses identical data structures  like SAP Easy DMS is smart-plm [documents].
(data structures: document info record, dock document structure, class system, ACL)

This reduces the project effort for conversion, as no migration is necessary and there is no interface to an external DMS to be maintained.

entry.title: [URGENT] All My Inbox apps in SAP BTP Build Work Zone are Crashing in 2025
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

All your Build workzone My Inbox apps are crashing in Build workzone, please help.

entry.title: Replicate Business Partner from SAP S4hana to SAP CPQ extension fields mapping
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with the standard integration flow "Replicate Business Partner Relationships from SAP Master Data Integration", which is part of the SAP CPQ - Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Sales Order package.

Our customer requires the handling of a custom extension field (ZZExtensionField) that exists on both systems (SAP S/4HANA and SAP CPQ).
In the iFlow, this field needs to be mapped to the Customfields structure in SAP CPQ. However, since the standard iFlow does not include a mapping for this field, I need to implement it outside the standard functionality.

Here are some additional details regarding my challenge:

The post-processing step in the iFlow only receives the message payload, and the mapping uses Exchange Properties.
If I want to use these Exchange Properties in the post-processing step, I would need to replicate all standard iFlow requests (e.g., OAuth and Business Partner Get requests) within the post-processing.
Questions:

Is there a way to pass Exchange Properties directly to the post-processing step without replicating all the standard requests?
What is the best approach to enhance the iFlow to handle such a scenario without disrupting the standard design?
Are there any recommended practices or examples for efficiently extending the iFlow for custom field handling?
Any guidance, documentation references, or examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: KNKK-SAUFT(Sales value) update
entry.content: S067 - value is showing.

entry.title: Bulk Upload Items in LMS
entry.content:
We are trying to upload course titles as items in LMS. Is there a way to bulk upload these items since we have more than 400 courses to upload. 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: STO value fetch using BAPI
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppiin STO in condition tab values assign.

entry.title: Inner Joins is not working Composite Provider after Upgrade BW4HAN
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Could you please help me on the issue,

We have Composite Provider like below, In report when we are executing the report related to Plant and Material is giving 2 materials, one is related to Particular Plant and Another is not related to that plant. 

 

Please check and help me related to any notes etc.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
// Hi @vikaskumar1 It should just take a couple of minutes for the refreshment!

However the validity of certification is not extended after a couple of hours.

What should I do?

entry.title: Poor performance on IDM REST API, where to look to optimize?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we're building an app using SAP IDM rest api. When testing a simple request from postman :https://<server>:<port>/idmrestapi/v2/service/ET_MX_PERSON(ID=<userID>,TASK_GUID=guid'<taskGUID>'), the answer may take as long as 15 seconds to be returned, with only 30 attributes (and no links apart from the Mx_MANAGER).

Is this normal response time from the IDM api or should we look at the database or somewhere else to optimize it?

Thank you,

Clotilde

entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content:
In addition to the content I find it useful to consider the "SAP Application Extension Methodology".
A structured way to handle and govern extensions.

Please take a look on it:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-btp-guidance-framework/sap-application-extension-methodology

entry.title: SAP Standard Possibility for a huge number of single posting documents in Accounts receivables
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

could you provide some hints/recommendations how to deal with a very huge number of single Fi documents with small amounts from private customers. Currently we are dealing with them mostly on CPD customer accounts in FI-AR, but I assume that there might be a better standard solution from SAP in order to deal with it.

Thank you

entry.title: seek an answer.
entry.content: What technical and business processchanges should be noted when upgradingfrom SAP ECC 6.0 to S/4HANA 2021?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA integration with SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi @RajeshY ,

You can also refer to SAP Note 3465958  for troubleshooting purpose.

entry.title: Re: SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content:
Hello @aboooood 

Check the log of SWN_SELSEN run. You can find it in SWNCONFIG:

A probable cause are inactive web services - see the note 1833910 - HTTP Error 403 or 404 when running SWN_SELSEN (Extended Notifications)

Also notice that a typical delivery schedule is every 15 mins. So you need to wait between subsequents runs of SWN_SELSEN.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Does RSTRAN table exist in BW Bridge?
entry.content:
Hi@Alok6681 ,

tables like RSDS, RSTRAN exist, you can check them in ABAP project of BW Bridge. But it is not possible to view their contents as they are not released by SAP, hence you will get "not authorized" error.

Partially required information can be found in BW Bridge Cockpit, like count of ADSOs or Infoobjects, but not everything.

A solution could be to raise an incident to SAP, asking to release necessary tables.

entry.title: Can't preview Crystal Report Layout for A/R correction invoices
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I have created a crystal report layout for my SAP B1 A/R correction invoices and imported it on the system.

In my 'Report and Layout manager', code 'CSI4' is set for A/R correction invoices' layouts.

Then, when I open an already existing correction invoice and click on 'Preview' to view the report, I get these error messages:

No matching records found 'Document Type List' (RTYP) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
No matching records found 'Document' (RDOC) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]

When I open Layout designer to see which layout is set as default, the document type is automatically set as 'CSI2' in the dropdown list. However when I open the list, CSI2 doesn't exist in it + when I checked RTYP table(Document Type List), there's no 'CSI2' code defined, it only has CSI3 and CSI4.

I have also noticed that I can't even see SAP's own PLD layout for correction invoices. The same error messages appear when I set it as my default layout and click preview so I guess there's nothing wrong with my Crystal report and the problem lies somewhere else.

I'm new to SAP B1 and I'd really appreciate any help.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad: Display Background Send Mail Workflow Task with Decision Step in My Inbox and N
entry.content: Thanks for this informative topic, i still have one major issue though, in my workflow i am sending multiple send mail steps on a loop, if the step is made not background and requiring to confirm end of processing that will make the workflow wait until each work item is completed before sending the next notification which is a show stopper, since this is a notification and there is nothing for the user to do, the workflow should not be blocked waiting for it

entry.title: Re: Is there an option to Search emails from shared mailb...
entry.content:
If you register the external authentication with the shared emailadress, you can access the mails via selecting an other authentication. 

We've had the same issue before and solved it by creating 6 external authentications, each registered with the emailadress that we needed to read, and then reading out all the mailboxes one by one by selecting a different authentication. A bit of a workaround, but it works.

entry.title: Incoterm Location 1 - Can it remain empty in BP masterdata and sales order?
entry.content:
Hi all,

there are some questions regarding the incoterms and the error handling. 

When the incoterms ID (like "EXW") are maintained in the BP master data, there is an error occurring which tells me to fill the incoterms location. In customizing, there is no way to change this error handling. Also for sales orders - in the incompleteness procedure I can only set the incoterm ID, but not especially the field "incoterms location". 

Is there any chance that the incoterms ID can be used without the field "incoterms location"? 

Thanks and best regards

Katja

entry.title: Re: Creating OData Services with CDS using SADL and Annotation.
entry.content:
Hi, both went really well, thank you! I now want to go one step further and generate a Fiori app from the odata. When I select a template via the BAS and connect to the system, I can see almost all the services in the selection. Unfortunately, only the two created in this way do not. Is this an error, or are there other conditions for a service to be displayed in this list?

I would be very happy to receive an answer!

entry.title: Re: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content:
HI @WouterLemaire ,thanks for your reply

I want an open source library for document editor not image . 

also i want to process the file after the change from the editor , like replace {fullname} with real data from selected employee . 

If you know any open source library to do that . 

Also its easy to add any library to RAP or CAP ? 

I think i can do it in rap when i make a project from Vscode from RAP ODATA  , right ?

entry.title: Re: ABAP INSERT and SUBMIT REPORT --> Catch SYNTAX_ERROR
entry.content:
Hi,
try to use 'cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( )'
and 'CATCH cx_sy_rtti_syntax_error'.

entry.title: Re: How to extract data from BPC generated ADSO to BW sta...
entry.content: Activate the "Use as Source of data" checkbox from the BPC model setting. This will generate the BADI provider for the model. Next you can create a Composite provider and include the BADI provider into it. Now you can create transformation from the Compsite provider to the BW ADSO to which you want to load the data.

entry.title: Re: Funds Reservation used in term of Earmarked Funds (Fund Management)
entry.content:
Hi Anil,

 

Yes , earmarked can be used in PR,PO & MIRO as well, It will also store data in earmarked consumption history.

entry.title: Re: Projects and Workspaces in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi,

sorry, this explains nothing.

I'm doing my first steps in BAS, just a few days, and I have a mess 5 workspaces. I don't know how it comes so far. I don't know how I have created them. I don't know how to get from one to another, it just happens randomly. I don't know how to delete them.

Tom

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM core capabilities that supports the adoption of clean core
entry.content: @Ajay88 still no  QG4 workbook/checklist?!

entry.title: Re: SWNCONFIG works but still no Email were send
entry.content: Hello Dominik, i checked the logs its in the Bild6 attached to the question every thing is fine but still no Email send. i tried to change Recipient Address i used to put my Email then changed it to * and now im getting error 403.

entry.title: Activated flexible workflow in the system
entry.content:
1)As we have activated flexible workflow in system for all valid work items (purchase requisition/purchase order/contracts/scheduling agreement and if it gets approved from all level, then also the system is open, and the creator is able to make any changes in the purchase order (fully approved).Even the work item if in the release process then also the creator is able to make any changes in the work item. 

2)Also please let us know once if user has accepted the purchase order then is there any option where he can de-release the purchase order. 

3)For suppose if we reject any work-item then it goes to the creator of the work-item, in all cases it should be restarted but the work-item is getting restarted for only those conditions which are mentioned in the standard conditions for restart to trigger. But what if there is any other condition in which user will have to change the PO how restart will retrigger for completion of workflow. 

4)Do we need to configure all manage workflow templates in all the client we are moving or is there any option where we can export import workflow templates within different systems/client. 

5)Is there any mass option available for uploading flexible workflow templates in system as there is huge DOA available to upload with different combinations. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Activated flexible workflow in the system
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To answer your queries: 

Please be aware each document might behave slightly different, so to ensure consistency I have answered for Purchase Orders below. To check for Purchase Requisitions/Contracts etc, please review the associated help documentation for that document:

1)As we have activated flexible workflow in system for all valid work items (purchase requisition/purchase order/contracts/scheduling agreement and if it gets approved from all level, then also the system is open, and the creator is able to make any changes in the purchase order (fully approved).Even the work item if in the release process then also the creator is able to make any changes in the work item. 

Edit of a document is possible depending on the status of the document. This is explained further here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/ecc316567879bf45e10000000a4450e5-661.html?locale=en-US#editing-an-existing-purchase-order

2)Also please let us know once if user has accepted the purchase order then is there any option where he can de-release the purchase order. 

There is no de-release option when a document has been fully approved. The document can be rejected or approved. There is the option to 'Withdraw from Approval' when the document is In Approval status. This does not de-release, it simply takes the document out of approval to allow edit. This is explained in the above link as well.

3)For suppose if we reject any work-item then it goes to the creator of the work-item, in all cases it should be restarted but the work-item is getting restarted for only those conditions which are mentioned in the standard conditions for restart to trigger. But what if there is any other condition in which user will have to change the PO how restart will retrigger for completion of workflow. 

The restart of flexible workflow is explained here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/46c9e5b6ba7a4feeb920ca1cbad68c73.html?locale=en-US

Where it states: 

  • The configuration step Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow is available to manage conditions that retriggers the approval workflow for purchase orders. You can configure this step using the app Manage Your Solutions . Go to the configuration step Configure Your Solution  Sourcing and Procurement  Operational Procurement  Purchase Order Processing  Manage Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow in the app Manage Your Solutions.
  • To decide which critical changes lead to restart, you can create an implementation for the custom logic Define Conditions to Restart Flexible Workflow in Purchase Orders in the app Custom Fields and Logic.

Please also review here: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/which-fields-are-relevant-for-the-restart-of-flexible-workflow-in-purchase/ba-p/12836637

4)Do we need to configure all manage workflow templates in all the client we are moving or is there any option where we can export import workflow templates within different systems/client. 

In relation to exporting workflow templates, please review here: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/647ec99192b249659b4e6f00a27d925e.html?locale=en-US

5)Is there any mass option available for uploading flexible workflow templates in system as there is huge DOA available to upload with different combinations. 

Please review above documentation. 

I hope this helps answer and provide the links where you need to review to understand the functionality available. 

Kind Regards, 
Lisa 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Building partner products on SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: When will the Publish Product app and the possibility for partners to create an add on be available in the Landscape Portal?

entry.title: Re: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:
Hello,

Check if there is TransactionNotification or PostTransaction running in ProductionOrder, if you have, disabled them and disabled all the addons too. Then try again.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: Strangely, I could not get the logs you shared in your question even if I open DEBUG level logging. I see that junit is enabled in your local, can you try disabling it by setting installed.tenants as empty and restart the server?

entry.title: Re: Can't preview Crystal Report Layout for A/R correction invoices
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you logged in with the manager account? It seems to me theres something to do with authorization.

Best regards

Hope you are doing good!

Pranav Garud

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content:
The logs in the question were enabled using these properties:

log4j2.logger.azure.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.azure.hotfolder
log4j2.logger.azure.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.azure.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT
log4j2.logger.cloud.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.hotfolder
log4j2.logger.cloud.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.cloud.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.name = de.hybris.platform.cloud.commons
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.level = DEBUG
log4j2.logger.cloudcommons.appenderRef.stdout.ref = STDOUT

when i execute "npm start"

app works perfectly in deployed version. struggles with local execution .

Thanks in advance for your time.

entry.title: Re: Azure Cloud Hotfolder not fetching data with WSL
entry.content: I removed any tenant from installed.tenants and application started without errors, but i'm still not able to see any logs, I also tried with this kba https://me.sap.com/notes/3506703/E but the group id seems correct

entry.title: Increase in Non Completions for online Learning items in LMS
entry.content:
Hi

 

Are any users noticing an increase of users reports non completions in LMS when doing online learning items. Since more and more of our staff Work From Home we are finding that about 10% of users report that after they have completed a learning online item the system is not recording the progress or not marking it as complete. 

 

I realise this could be down to a number of variables but its becoming a real problem for us

 

Thanks

entry.title: Customer Ageing Query in Hana for SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to write a customer ageing query in SAP B1 Hana,

Here's what I have (lifted from SQL and converted):

It's getting stuck on the 'WHERE' in the IFNull lines if anyone can offer some assistance please?

SELECT
T1."CardCode", T1."CardName", T1."CreditLine", T0."RefDate", T0."Ref1" AS "Document Number",
CASE
WHEN T0."TransType" = 13 THEN 'Invoice'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 14 THEN 'Credit Note'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 30 THEN 'Journal'
WHEN T0."TransType" = 24 THEN 'Receipt'
END AS "Document Type",

T0."DueDate",
(T0."Debit" - T0."Credit") AS "Balance",

IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= -1), 0) AS "Future",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 0 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 30), 0) AS "Current",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 30 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 60), 0) AS "31-60 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 60 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 90), 0) AS "61-90 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') > 90 AND DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') <= 120), 0) AS "91-120 Days",
IFNULL((SELECT T0."Debit" - T0."Credit" WHERE DAYS_BETWEEN(T0."DueDate", '[%1]') >= 121), 0) AS "121+ Days"

FROM "JDT1" T0
INNER JOIN "OCRD" T1 ON T0."ShortName" = T1."CardCode"

entry.title: Two applications for SAP Build Work Zone Standard in IAS
entry.content:
Dear Gurus

I have published SAP Build Work Zone standart in BTP trial subaccount.

Now in SAP Cloud Identity service I can see two applications.

What is the purpose of second application?

Which application I need to select from user provisioning?

Thank you

Regards

Vladimir Kogan

entry.title: No business place data exists in the document. Message no. GLO_BUPLA000
entry.content: when creating Purchase order we are getting this error. The business place configuration is in place

entry.title: SEND NOTIFICATIOS/ ALERTS BETWEEN USERS IN S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC
entry.content:
Hello,

I as a SAP user (A) want to send messages in notification or alert mode to another SAP user (B), is there any way to do it?

In SAP R3, for example, we can send message type pop-up. It would be something similar.

Is there such an option?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content:
Hi @Marm 

If you are referring to assessments – they are unlimited attempts.
So there are only 3 attempts for the exam, but if you have passed the exam and have to do the stay certified assessment to extend the certification you have unlimited attempts.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Managed_UUID vs Managed_Semantic
entry.content: There is a new link for this topic at SAP Help: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/numbering

entry.title: VA03-Incompletion log-WBS element data missing.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting input values from IDOC to create sales order. The requirement is to add WBS Element into the sales order based on the input from the IDOC. I have maintained a custom table to solve this requirement. The wbs element is fetched and updated to the sales order item through MV45AFZZ. The wbs element is getting displayed in the va03 screen and also in vbap table. But, the incompletion log is showing that wbs element is missing. Even when I try to expand the incompletion log, the wbs element is visible. This looks like a strange issue, and if anyone know the solution, Kindly help with this.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Teaching Enterprise Architecture with Real-World Relevance
entry.content:
I find Dr.Kotusev's CSVLOD model more realistic and applies better in SAP-centric world. I wish SAP EA should have been designed as TOGAF+Kotusev mix rather than the existing diluted version of TOGAF alone. Even though TOGAF has managed to become a kind of lingua franca in EA world, the emphasis on Governance in TOGAF is steered towards C-suite executives as audiences. Dr.Kotusev makes a lot of sense in that context where he tries to bring evidence based reasoning to EA.
My opinion is that,I would like to think TOGAF as a way of standardising language and terminology but implementation plans should be based on CVSLOD and working through the Essential artefacts.

entry.title: SAP Build Publishing Public Link
entry.content:
Greetings,

I deployed an app in SAP Build and found the link under "HTML5 Applications." However, the link is not publicly accessible—it requires company credentials for access.

Can someone guide me on how to remove this restriction and make the link publicly accessible without requiring any specific credentials?

entry.title: Re: CF Deployment Error: Error getting tenant t0
entry.content: Hi, has this problem being solved as I am having the same with CDS 8.6.1. etc ?

entry.title: Re: Manage / start XBP jobs using REST interface
entry.content:
"ABAP Connectivity" will not know the answer to this question, it is to specific. You will need to ask the team that is responsible for job scheduling and the XBP function modules.

I didn't find a matching tag for that topic, but the OSS component is
BC-CCM-API-CSI-XMI

Perhaps a SAP ticket on that component will provide an answer. (In any case, the answer needs to come from that team directly, because nobody else can speak in their name and provide details about their development schedule and release planning.)

entry.title: Re: Can't preview Crystal Report Layout for A/R correction invoices
entry.content:
Greetings @williamwachholz 

I am logged in with a super user account.

Harry

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System fro...
entry.content: Hi Anirban,

entry.title: Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution Feedback
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for some feedback on best practices for an SAP Service and Asset Manager Mobile Solution implementation.

We would appreciate any feedback you can provide on your experience to the following questions (and anything else you would be willing to share):

  1. How long did it take to implement the solution?
  2. Which version/release did you implement
  3. Did you use a partner or internal resources (for entire implementation or for various phases; e.g. project management, system setup, configuration, training)?
  4. Any Lessons learned?

We have a relatively small footprint and only looking to implement at 2 plants.

Thanks in advance,

Bob

entry.title: Re: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System fro...
entry.content: Hi Anirban, which API can I call from other system to create the supplier with an attachment?
